name: ljg-explain-words
description: Word Soul Master — deep-dive English word mastery skill for Claude Code

metadata.description: A deep-dive bilingual word mastery tool. It deconstructs a single word (English or Chinese) into its etymology and core semantics, output in two parallel native versions — one Chinese, one English — each closing with a bilingual epiphany. Accepts either-language input and surfaces the truest cross-language equivalent.

plugins.name: ljg-explain-words
plugins.description: Word soul master skill. Use /ljg-explain-words <word> to deeply deconstruct any English word.
